{"step_by_step_thinking": "CT and MRI are both very useful for diagnosing spondylolisthesis, as they can provide detailed images of the bones and soft tissues. X-ray lumbar spine- AP view and X-ray lumbar spine- Lateral view are also useful, but the lateral view is specifically mentioned in the documents as the best way to assess the degree of slippage. Therefore, the AP view would be the least useful compared to the lateral view for diagnosing spondylolisthesis.", "answer_choice": "C"}
